3132830.name: Nekoshi : Bento
3132830.description:
SushiCat: Bento is a unique game blending roguelike deckbuilding with the tile-matching genre. Get ready to take risks and show your good taste to rack up the highest score!

Place sushi tiles strategically to create mouthwatering combos. Maximize your score by matching different proteins and sushi types while discovering new flavors to cook up your recipe for victory. Each new game is unique!

An adorable tile-based game that will leave you "purring" in thought.

With each new game, discover and unlock new tiles and bonuses to perfect your bento!

Use a variety of elements: unique perks in every game, special tiles, and upgrades. Craft an epic bento box packed with flavors to score big and unlock even more upgrades!

[Animated banner]

🌟 An endless playground! Break the game with insane combos all over the grid!

🔄 Carry-over combos across grids!

🎴 Special tiles, upgrades, and bonuses to spice up your matches!

Dive into the delicious and adorable world of SushiCat.
A cozy atmosphere awaits you, filled with purring SushiCats and scrumptious delights.

  • Upgrade your bento and discover how to combine different proteins to score the most points.

  • Enjoy adorable hand-drawn visuals!

  • 100% vegetarian.

[Animated banner]
SushiCat: Bento was lovingly crafted by a duo of game developers from Réunion Island.
Together, we founded Titang Studio, with the dream of creating original and high-quality indie games!

We’d love to hear your constructive feedback, so don’t hesitate to reach out.
We’ll do our best to reply to your messages :3!

🍣 Bon appétit!
